linkedEditingPatterns.description: Linked editing between CSS custom property definition (--name: value) and var(--name) references. Renaming one updates all occurrences.
Linked editing between @keyframes name and animation-name references. Editing the animation name in either location synchronizes both.
Linked editing between @font-face font-family declaration and font-family usage in rules. Keeps font names in sync.
Linked editing between @layer declarations and layer references. Editing a layer name in one location updates @layer blocks and @import layer() assignments.
Linked editing between grid-template-areas names and grid-area references. Renaming an area in the template updates the grid-area assignments.
Linked editing between counter-reset definition and counter()/counters() references. Keeps counter names in sync.
Linked editing between @counter-style name and list-style-type references.
